title: Calyxhymenia cervantesii

intro: Calyxhymenia cervantesii, commonly known as Cervantes' calyxhymenia, is a medicinal plant species within the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a possible natural remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Calyxhymenia cervantesii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
